title: Hornet Removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx. Safe nest elimination from homes & properties. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast service!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Pelham Gardens? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services to protect your family and property from dangerous nests. Our experienced technicians safely remove hornet colonies from residential and commercial properties throughout this peaceful Bronx neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Pelham Gardens with rapid-response hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate nests while ensuring the safety of your family, pets, and neighbors.
localContext: Pelham Gardens' tree-lined streets and mix of single-family homes, Tudor-style houses, and garden apartments near Pelham Parkway provide ideal nesting sites for hornets in eaves, attics, and mature trees. The neighborhood's proximity to Bronx Park and abundant green spaces means hornet activity increases during warmer months, requiring professional intervention to protect residents enjoying their yards and local parks.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Pelham Gardens depending on availability. Once you call us, we'll schedule an appointment as quickly as possible, typically within 24 hours, as we understand the urgency and danger hornets pose to your household.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Pelham Gardens neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pelham Gardens' mature trees, gardens, and proximity to Pelham Parkway and Bronx Park create favorable conditions for hornets. They often build nests in attic vents, under roof eaves, in sheds, and within tree branches, especially during spring and summer months when colonies are most active.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our trained technicians use safe, EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during removal. We advise keeping family members and pets indoors during the treatment process, and the area is safe to access shortly after we complete the removal and provide clearance.
